parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.3, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user question directly and thoroughly.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.fields.text }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'sonar', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Answer the user question directly.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Loop Prompts').item.json.fields.text }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Prompt Score <reports@promptscore.io>', to: [$json.to], subject: $json.subject, html: $json.email_html }) }}
